programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: A married couple gets divorced in the middle of a home renovation, giving the flippers an opportunity they cannot turn down; the team soon learns that taking on someone else's flip also comes with someone else's problems.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team finds a ramshackle house down the street from a new school opening in a couple of months; a glut of plumbing and roof problems, plus a tree-toppling disaster, may cause the team to miss their sales window before the school year starts.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Thanks to one of his Zombie House Buyers, Dolmar scores a waterfront deal in Holiday, Florida, with one big catch: the house had a fire. With two of three floors charred, hurricane setbacks, and material delays, can the Dealmaker revive this burnt zombie, or will his profit go up in smoke?

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard is faced with a big dilemma, do flipping and friendship go together?; his longtime friend Carrie, friend to his wife Clair, has fallen on some tough times and wants James' help; recently divorced and eager for financial freedom, Carrie convinces James she can handle the project even though she is a complete novice; together, they tackle a mid-century modern disaster with an unfinishe

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: Blue Ridge Mayor Rhonda and her husband Davey are looking to escape the public eye with a mountain home outside of town; beyond privacy, they're in search of serenity, an oversized primary suite and room for the grandkids to play; will epic mountain views or waterside privacy get their vote?

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: Chad and Kelsey are leaving Atlanta to marry and move to Blue Ridge; from stone and wood custom finishes to a three-car garage and a fully equipped outdoor grilling station, each home ticks a different box; which one will get the "I do?".

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Tierra is a musician with massive bumps on her ears that hold her back from performing.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Assisting with Lance's notoriously big bump that halted his rap dreams; Shelby has lost control of the mystery bumps she has developed; Dr. Lee proposes a long-shot cure for Jante, who has been losing pigment in her skin as well as her confidence.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Allie's lifestyle is ruined by the gumball-sized bump above her eye; Andrew's psoriasis and multiple body bumps have held him back from starting a family; Dr. Lyndsey assists Dr. Lee with Cristina's concerning shoulder lipoma.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In West Covina, Dusty uses magic to find his treasure; Lisa, determined to make her carpenter father proud, looks for something to refurbish and ends up channeling something else; Ivy wrestles with heels and tools, while Brandi gets in the ring to honor her grandpa.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers return to Moreno Valley, where an old friend surprises them; Dusty & Lupe do their best to hit it out of the park; Ivy finds a couple of "less scary" coffins; Brandi isn't going to let anything ruin her bright and sunny attitude.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: All the buyers are excited about the upscale potential of Rancho Palos Verdes, but it's Dave who finds his loot there; Brandi racks up a decent profit while saving herself from having to shell out for shelving; in Garden Grove, Kerri keeps Lisa focused long enough to weave a profit, while Kenny faces his fears in a new way.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Bathed in the heat of Moreno Valley, Kenny has difficulty with names, so he calls an audible; Brandi can't catch a break without some help from above; Dave gets stuck with the business end of an unsatisfying locker; Dusty and Lupe put their "street" smarts to good use.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders are stunned to discover that a cache of Asian antiques and artifacts could command prices as vast as the continent they came from.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Back in Montebello, Kenny is determined to stop swearing by carrying around a cuss counter; Dave goes in big on a high-end locker; Ivy doesn't hit the bullseye when it counts; Dusty and Lupe hope to hear the pristine sounds of success.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Revival
programme.desc: Willie nervously prepares to show off his golf skills at Tim Tebow's star-studded charity golf tournament. Meanwhile, Jacob and Bella put their energy into building their vintage clothing store, and Sadie gets ready for maternity leave by holding auditions to keep her Whoa That's Good podcast running strong.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny gets ganged up on in Riverside by the field of buyers; Dave buys an old unit and takes a voyage back in time; Ivy scores a locker that inspires him to go clubbing; Emily puts her foot down with a statement buy on a massive locker.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
